VaraBatarPage.metaDescription: HSS is one of Sweden's most ambitious Sea Scout groups, with a diverse fleet used for training, sailing and safety, helping Scouts develop skills at every level.
VaraBatarPage.title: Our current fleet
VaraBatarPage.info: HSS is one of the most ambitious sea scout corps in Sweden. We have a wide and varied fleet that is used for both education, sailing and safety on the water. Our boats give scouts the opportunity to develop from beginners to experienced sailors.

utbildningsjollar.title: Training dinghies (Optimist dinghies)
utbildningsjollar.info: Apotekarne, Kausarne, Vantarne, Plopp, Cloetta, Snobben, Titanic and practice sails

tvåkronor.title: Two Crowns
tvåkronor.info: Our Two Crowns boats are used for training and sailing in larger crews → Piff and Puff

följebåtar.title: Safety boat
följebåtar.info: For safety and support during activities on the water we use Tryggve IV and Ebbe

viggar.title: Albin Viggar
viggar.info: We also have two Albin Viggars → Lumbago and Cephalea

h.title: H-boats
h.info: Our H-boats are used for longer sailings and more advanced training → Nocke, Vendela and Goofy
